title: jamaiciella gauntlettii
side_effects: Jamaiciella gauntlettii can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal issues. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts has been linked to liver damage, kidney problems, and an increased risk of bleeding. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also cause neurological symptoms, including headaches, dizziness, and numbness in the extremities. Additionally, improper use of Jamaiciella gauntlettii has been associated with an increased risk of interact with other medications, potentially leading to adverse reactions.
